channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Enhypen’s Heeseung Departs K-pop Group to Work on Solo Album
item.description: 🚀 Heeseung is spreading his wings! Excited to see what's next for this talented artist 🎶 #Enhypen #Heeseung #SoloJourney

item.title: Arlo Parks – “Get Go”
item.description: 🎶 Grooving into the weekend with the latest from Arlo Parks! Let's hit play on "Get Go" and vibe together! 🎵 #NewMusicFriday #ArloParks

item.title: Modest Mouse Return With First New Song in Five Years
item.description: Guess who's back with a bang 🚀 Modest Mouse drops a new tune after 5 years! 🎶 Let's crank up the volume 🎸 #ModestMouse #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Big Thief Set 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🚐✨ Big Thief bringing their magic on the road in 2026! Who's hopping on the tour bus? 🎶 #BigThiefTour2026

item.title: Bon Jovi Biopic Announced
item.description: 🎸 Rock on! Bon Jovi biopic hitting the big screen soon 🤘 Who's ready to relive those classic hits? #BonJovi #MusicMovies
